Package index

All functions

Add body text

Default method for add_body_text

add_header(<TFL_spec>)

Default method for add_header
add_span_header()
Add stub (spanning) column definition

Add or update a style definition for TFL_options

Default method for add_style
add_subtitle()
Add a subtitle
add_title()
Add a title
c_addrow()
Insert Additional Row in Conditional Rows
c_clear()
Clear Cell Content in Conditional Rows
c_glue()
Concatenate a Value to Cell Text in Conditional Rows
c_merge()
Merge Adjacent Columns in Conditional Rows
c_pageBreak()
Insert a page break at the matching row
c_style()
Apply Style to Columns in Conditional Rows
clean_reports()
Clean Obsolete and Orphaned JSON Files from a Meta Folder
compute_cols()
Define Conditional Row Actions for Tables
create_figure()
Create a Figure Specification
create_report()
Combine Multiple TFL Specifications and/or Reports into a Single Report
create_table()
Create a Table Specification
create_text()
Create a Text Document Specification
define_cols()
Define or modify column properties
f_combine()
Combine multiple style names for explicit grouping
list_reports()
List Saved Reports in a Meta Folder
p_margins()
Define page margins
p_page()
Define page settings
print(<TFL_spec>)
Print method for TFL specification objects
replay_report()
Re-render a DOCX from Stored JSON
run_replay_app()
Launch the Combined Replay Shiny App
run_styles_editor()
Launch the styles template editor Shiny app
s_border()
Define border properties
s_borders()
Define borders for table cells
s_font()
Define font properties for a style
s_indents()
Define indentation properties for paragraphs
s_paragraph()
Define paragraph properties for a style
s_spacing()
Define spacing properties for paragraphs
s_table_style()
Define table-specific styling
save_report()
Save TFL Report to JSON with Data Files
set_document()
Set document properties
set_page_style()
Set document style properties
tfl_font_status()
Show current font status
tfl_get_option()
Retrieve a single package option
tfl_get_options()
Return the active package options
tfl_list_templates()
List available bundled templates
tfl_print_style_atoms() tfl_style_atoms_catalog()
Print all built-in style atoms to the console
tfl_rescan_fonts()
Rescan system fonts
tfl_reset_options()
Reset all session options to package defaults
tfl_set_options()
Update the session package settings
tfl_spec_preview_selection() tfl_spec_preview_prompt()

view_tfl_spec()
